query:
ALTER TABLE users 
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS stripe_customer_id VARCHAR(128),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS stripe_subscription_id VARCHAR(128),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS plan ENUM('free', 'premium') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'free',
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS plan_country VARCHAR(2),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS plan_interval ENUM('monthly', 'annual'),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS plan_expires_at TIMESTAMP NULL;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user hdyLMsoyEsXdGrx.root --database 8Anvx7YrSTGCQYVCEabf8q --execute 
ALTER TABLE users 
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS stripe_customer_id VARCHAR(128),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS stripe_subscription_id VARCHAR(128),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS plan ENUM('free', 'premium') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'free',
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS plan_country VARCHAR(2),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS plan_interval ENUM('monthly', 'annual'),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS plan_expires_at TIMESTAMP NULL;
